data.description: Phase 2: Converted 118 of 121 xfail tests to passing. Added 17 pure functions to workspace_state.py. Three-tier strategy: config contract validation (YAML configs enforce correct behavior), pure function tests (algorithms against synthetic fixtures), event schema contracts (JSON round-trip). 3 remaining xfail: timebox prioritisation (needs live clock), escalation inline display (needs interactive terminal), gap suggestions (needs LLM semantic analysis).

data.title: Implement Intent Composition (REQ-INTENT-002/003/004)
data.description: Intent composition layer missing. REQ-INTENT-002 (compose intents from observations), REQ-INTENT-003 (intent deduplication), REQ-INTENT-004 (intent prioritisation) all have design artifacts but no code. Blocks Phase 2 consciousness loop.

data.title: Implement Lifecycle Fold-Back and Signal Typing (REQ-LIFE-002/004-008/013)
data.description: Lifecycle management gaps: fold-back protocol, signal typing, promotion gates, and lineage tracking all missing code. ADR-026 specifies signal typing. Blocks Phase 2 workspace lifecycle.

data.title: Complete OL Event Taxonomy (REQ-EVENT-002/003/004/005)
data.description: Full observability event taxonomy (REQ-EVENT-002 projection contract, REQ-EVENT-003 saga compensation, REQ-EVENT-004 causal threading, REQ-EVENT-005 schema validation) has partial code but gaps. ADR-025 provides roadmap.

data.title: Implement Sensory and Supervisory Systems (REQ-SENSE-*, REQ-SUPV-*)
data.description: Interoceptive and exteroceptive sensing (REQ-SENSE-001..006) and supervisory monitoring (REQ-SUPV-001..003) have no code. These are the autonomic systems that enable homeostasis — deferred from Phase 1a.

data.title: Close Tooling and UX Gaps (REQ-TOOL-001/003/006/007/014/015, REQ-UX-002+)
data.description: Multiple tooling gaps: REQ-TOOL-001 (graph visualisation), REQ-TOOL-003 (spec boundary check), REQ-TOOL-006 (telemetry dashboard), REQ-TOOL-007 (coverage report), REQ-TOOL-014/015 (export/import). UX features REQ-UX-002..006 also missing.

data.title: Implement Telemetry Tagging Across All Implemented REQ Keys
data.description: Telemetry observability (req= tags in logging/metrics) is missing for 84/85 REQ keys in production code. Phase 2 homeostasis requires telemetry. Estimated scope: add req= tags to all engine, evaluator, and command execution paths.
